name: Fediverse share
description: Share topics to Mastodon, Misskey, and the Fediverse — instance picker, remembered host, copy link, and Web Share.

settings_schema.label: Enable share control
settings_schema.description: Show the Share button on topic pages.

settings_schema.label: Default instance host
settings_schema.description: Hostname only, e.g. mastodon.social. Pre-fills the instance field (members can change it).

settings_schema.label: Suggested instances
settings_schema.description: Hostnames shown as quick picks (one per line). Leave empty for built-in defaults.

settings_schema.label: Misskey share
settings_schema.description: Open Misskey share intent on the chosen instance.

settings_schema.label: Web Share (mobile)
settings_schema.description: Use the browser share sheet when supported.
